description:
Add a distance reference / scale bar to the globe UI that dynamically shows ground distance at the current zoom level.

- Position bottom-right, above the compass (or bottom-center), using the same Google Maps white-card aesthetic
- Compute ground distance by sampling two screen points at a fixed pixel span and measuring their geodesic separation on Mars (radius ~3,389.5 km)
- Choose a 'nice' round number for the label (e.g. 100 km, 500 km, 1000 km) and adjust bar width to match
- Update on camera move end (no need for per-frame updates)
- Mars-specific: use areocentric radii, not Earth defaults
title: Add distance reference / scale bar
